title: goodenia viscida
intro: Goodenia viscida, also known as sticky goodenia, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Goodeniaceae and is native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Goodenia viscida can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to the lack of extensive scientific research on its effects.
